raw_consumer_statement: My card was used on XX/XX/XXXX, XXXX, XXXX and XXXX of 2025. I notified Citi Bank these charges were not made by me. I live in Florida and the charges are all in New York. someone has gotten my credit card information or a duplicate card. I'm using a XXXX  to get around the house because of XXXX XXXX XXXX and was certainly not in New York when these charges were made. My card was never out of my possession.
